inputs.label: Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of the wall in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of the wall in meters.

inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Total height of the wall in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total height of the wall in meters.

inputs.label: Brick Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of a single brick in millimeters (e.g., 190).

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of a single brick in millimeters (e.g., 190).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir tuğlanın milimetre cinsinden uzunluğu (ör. 190).

inputs.label: Brick Width (Thickness)
inputs.businessContext: Width or thickness of the brick, which determines wall thickness in mm.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width or thickness of the brick, which determines wall thickness in mm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duvar kalınlığını belirleyen tuğla genişliği veya kalınlığı (mm).

inputs.label: Brick Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the brick in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the brick in millimeters.

inputs.label: Mortar Joint Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of mortar joints (bed and head joints) in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of mortar joints (bed and head joints) in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Harç derzlerinin (yatay ve düşey derzler) milimetre cinsinden kalınlığı.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of extra mortar to account for spillage, overfill, and waste.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of extra mortar to account for spillage, overfill, and waste.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dökülme, taşma ve atık için ek harç yüzdesi.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
